---
name: Improvement Proposal
about: Suggest a meaningful change to an existing template, guideline, or procedure
title: "[IMPROVEMENT] "
labels: improvement
assignees: ''
---

## Which document does this affect?

<!-- e.g., templates/MEMORY.md, guidelines/CODE_REVIEW_GUARDRAILS.md -->

## What's the problem with the current version?

<!-- What gap, friction, or edge case does the current document not handle well? -->

## What real-world situation prompted this?

<!-- The best improvements come from practice. What happened on your team? -->

## What change do you propose?

<!-- Describe the change. Include a before/after if helpful. -->

## Does this affect any other documents?

<!-- e.g., if you change DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md, does it need to align with CODE_REVIEW_GUARDRAILS.md? -->

## Have you tested this change on your team?

- [ ] Yes — used on a real team/project
- [ ] No — theoretical improvement

<!-- If yes, briefly describe the outcome -->
